arc_summary: Melissa's sustained pattern of communication boundary violations across the full dataset: message flooding (volume-based coercion), response-demand pressure (demanding immediate responses with consequences for non-compliance), continuation-after-stop (continuing into Eli's silence after conflict limits are set), and custodial-time contact overstepping (non-urgent contact during Eli's parenting time). The arc spans Aug 2024 through Apr 2026, concentrating in three triage hot periods (Aug 2024, May 2025, Aug 2025) with continued Phase C maintenance. Sub-pattern trajectory: early signals are mega-cluster flooding candidates; Phase B signals add response-demand, continuation-after-self-demand, and read-receipt-as-surveillance mechanisms; Phase C signals confirm the response-time-norm-setting and punitive-non-disclosure sub-patterns as baseline behavior. The Apr 2026 confirmed flooding event (S-012) provides the dataset's only ADD-001-verified flooding instance, retroactively supporting the flooding-candidate classification of the larger Aug 2024 and Aug 2025 mega-clusters.

arc_initialization.basis: Triage heatmap projects RF-07 hot periods in Phase B. Phase A baseline (B-001) confirms zero signals in low-conflict period. Arc initialized to watching state in B-002 as forward-tracking placeholder.

arc_promotion.trigger: S-001 — Aug 4-5 2024 mega-cluster (~80 messages); first RF-07 primary signal; confirmed hot-period anchor for Aug 2024 triage hot period

signals.summary: Aug 4-5 2024 mega-cluster (~80 messages); rapid-pair opener ROW-6279-6280; flooding candidate pending synthesis timestamp confirmation. Aug 2024 hot-period anchor. Compound: COMP-RF07-001 (RF-04+RF-05+RF-07).
Response-demand with contempt slur. Dec 14 (out-of-order row; gap between B-020 and B-021). Sunday parenting-time context probable.

Continuation-after-self-demand: Melissa issues 'stop texting me / harassment' stop command then immediately continues messaging. May 2025 hot-period anchor. Compound: COMP-RF07-002 (RF-04+RF-05+RF-07).
signals.verbatim_anchor: 'If you don't have anything constructive or a solution stop texting me. Otherwise it's harassment and I will file harassment' (ROW-9536)

signals.summary: Aug 14-15 2025 mega-cluster (~80+ messages). Aug 2025 hot-period anchor. Compound: COMP-RF07-003 (RF-04+RF-07). Flooding candidate parallel to S-001.
signals.verbatim_anchor: 'shit father' + 'dumbass' + 'asshole' slur cluster within dense messaging episode

signals.summary: Three-message read-receipt surveillance sequence: 'I'll assume you are not picking her up' / read-receipt cited / 'Could've responded when you read it'.
signals.verbatim_anchor: 'I'll assume you are not picking her up since I haven't heard back from you' (ROW-14188)

signals.summary: ADD-004 confirmed: Melissa maintained contact with Olivia during Eli's parenting weekend; weaponized Olivia's distress signals as evidence against Eli. Contempt threat for interfering with child's contact.
signals.verbatim_anchor: 'She doesn't feel safe and supported as evidenced by the texts I got' (ROW-14508)

signals.summary: Contemptuous compliance demand: 'Drop her off at the party and quit being a bitch' + 'You're such a dipshit'.
signals.verbatim_anchor: 'Drop her off at the party and quit being a bitch' (ROW-14611)

signals.summary: Legal-evidence threat as response coercion: 'This is the exact shit that makes it easy to get full custody' / 'Keep it up. It's great evidence'. Cross-ref RF-05 S-024.
Melissa explicitly states she made multiple contact attempts (text + call) after Eli's silence, then reframes his boundary-holding as co-parenting failure.
signals.verbatim_anchor: 'I've tried to text you more recently and call but you don't respond' (ROW-14839)

signals.summary: Response-time norm-setting: 'Your idea that you don't need to answer me until you feel like it causes these issues'. Context: Eli was ill; Melissa dismisses health explanation as 'lame excuse'.
signals.verbatim_anchor: 'Your idea that you don't need to answer me until you feel like it causes these issues' (ROW-15082)

signals.summary: Information withholding as punishment for non-immediate response: 'Well I was going to share some info but since you won't answer nevermind'.
signals.verbatim_anchor: 'Well I was going to share some info but since you won't answer nevermind' (ROW-15552)

signals.summary: CONFIRMED FLOODING — ADD-001 threshold met with exact timestamps. 5 Received messages in 3 minutes 14 seconds (14:24:25–14:27:39 UTC). Eli's first response at 18:08:07 (ROW-15593) — 3h 41min later. Dataset's only confirmed flooding event. Compound: COMP-RF07-004 (RF-04 DARVO bruise/abuse reversal).
signals.verbatim_anchor: ROW-15588 (14:24:25): 'Why do you keep trying to make Olivia think I'm abusing her?'; ROW-15592 (14:27:39): 'Also Naomi was telling her dad yesterday...'

compound_patterns.summary: Aug 4-5 2024 triple compound. RF-07 flooding candidate + RF-04 sustained inadequate-father mega-cluster + RF-05 contempt legal threats.
May 2025 triple compound. RF-07 continuation-after-self-demand + RF-05 harassment legal threat to suppress co-parenting + RF-04 inadequate-father/Abby threat.
Aug 2025 compound. RF-07 flooding candidate + RF-04 Sev-3 mega-cluster (COMP-RF04-024).
Dataset-closing compound. RF-07 CONFIRMED FLOODING (5 msgs in 3:14) + RF-04 DARVO bruise/abuse reversal (COMP-RF04-030). Flooding mechanism delivers DARVO content.

arc_trajectory: Arc spans 20 months (Aug 2024–Apr 2026). Phase A (B-017): flooding candidate establishes arc. Phase B (B-020 through B-027): response-demand, read-receipt-surveillance, continuation-after-self-demand sub-patterns emerge. Phase C (B-028–B-031): custodial-time overstepping, legal-evidence coercion, response-time norm-setting, punitive non-disclosure — the pattern diversifies and maintains without attenuation. Final event (S-012 Apr 12 2026) provides confirmed flooding, completing the arc's evidentiary base.
synthesis_flags: S-001 Aug 2024 flooding candidate requires raw Excel timestamp review to confirm ADD-001 threshold
S-004 Aug 2025 flooding candidate requires raw Excel timestamp review to confirm ADD-001 threshold
S-012 Apr 2026 is timestamp-confirmed — use as baseline for flooding sub-pattern characterization
S-002 Dec 14 2024 Sunday context — if confirmed as Eli's parenting time, elevate to Sev-2 (ADD-004)
S-007 Oct 25-26 Saturday-Sunday context — if confirmed as Eli's parenting time, consider ADD-004 compound

cross_rf_notes.RF-04: RF-07 signals compound with RF-04 in all 4 compound patterns. Flooding episodes (S-001, S-004, S-012) deliver RF-04 inadequate-father/DARVO content. RF-07 adds the volume/timing dimension to what RF-04 documents as content.
cross_rf_notes.RF-05: S-003 and S-008 compound with RF-05 (legal threats as response-demand coercion). RF-05 'contempt your ass' / 'great evidence' / 'harassment' framing functions as RF-07 communication pressure.
cross_rf_notes.RF-02: RF-07 custodial-time overstepping (S-006) is the inverse of RF-02 phone-blocking: RF-02 = Melissa blocks Eli's contact during her time; RF-07 = Melissa intrudes into Eli's time. Separate mechanisms, same control dynamic.
cross_rf_notes.RF-09: Response-time blame (S-010) and continuation-after-silence reframing (S-009) have RF-09 (gaslighting) components — Eli's boundary-holding is recharacterized as failure/neglect.
